prompt: I have a screenshot of a SaaS landing page hero section. It shows a dark navy background, a large headline that says 'Ship faster. Break nothing.', a subheadline about CI/CD automation, two CTA buttons (one primary blue 'Start Free Trial', one ghost 'See Demo'), and a product screenshot on the right side. Build me the full landing page HTML from this description.

assertions.text: Output is a single valid HTML file (has <!DOCTYPE html> and closing </html>)
File contains a design rationale comment block documenting source material, detected niche, preserved elements, and improvements
Tailwind CSS is loaded via CDN script tag
The exact headline 'Ship faster. Break nothing.' appears in the output
Both 'Start Free Trial' and 'See Demo' CTAs are present
Mobile hamburger menu is implemented (look for hamburger/menu icon and toggle logic in JS)
Page includes more than just the hero — has at least one additional section (features, testimonials, pricing, or footer)
Page has at least title, meta description, and og:title tags
File contains at least 10 lines of vanilla JavaScript for interactivity
